title: Replace Filter Icon with Custom Group By SVG on Reports Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the group-by icon on the Reports & Dashboards page to use a custom SVG that clearly represents grouping, so that the action is visually distinct from filtering.
description:
Replace the generic filter icon with custom SVG icons for the group-by action on the Reports/Dashboards page. Custom SVGs were provided for both selected and unselected states.

Note: The filter icon was not visible in dark mode and needed a color adjustment.
acceptance_criteria: Group by icon uses the custom SVG for both selected and unselected states
Icon is visible in both light and dark mode
Icon is applied to the Reports/Dashboards page group-by action
ux_changes: Replaced the filter icon with custom group-by SVGs on the Reports & Dashboards page. Dark mode visibility issue flagged.
implementation_notes: Dark mode required a color code adjustment for the SVG icon visibility.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the SVG icon replacement and flagged a dark mode visibility issue requiring a color code update.
